name: flow
description: State-aware ticket-to-PR delivery, workspace operations, memory, and maintenance for Flow-managed repositories.

interface.longDescription: Inspect current Flow work, then start, answer, resume, repair, revise, or report a ticket or pull request from durable tracker, run, lease, and forge evidence. Includes isolated worktrees, configured stage handlers, memory, and native collaboration-worker maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Show the Flow cockpit and the most useful next action.
Run this ticket from its current state to a draft pull request.
Inspect and repair the current Flow workspace.
